modules.title: Home Command Center
modules.desc: AMOS首页战情室：市场状态、时间轴、资金迁移、事件压力、持仓战场。

modules.title: CRDO Stock Intelligence Page
modules.desc: 个股作战室样板：个股身份、估值战场、Gann、事件、AI Debate、证据链。

modules.title: Valuation Battle Map
modules.desc: 七层估值：宏观约束、内在价值、市场共识、Narrative、周期、股性、极端风险。

modules.title: Gann × Event × Gamma Resonance
modules.desc: 执行层：Gann时间、Gann价格、事件压力、Gamma、Price Action确认。

modules.title: Narrative Lifecycle & Capital Rotation
modules.desc: 叙事生命周期与资金迁移：Expansion、Rotation、Defensive Shift、Late-cycle Chase。

modules.title: Stock Personality Radar
modules.desc: 个股股性雷达：核心龙头、二线高Beta、流动性赌场代理、长久期未来故事等。

modules.title: Portfolio Battle Map & Migration
modules.desc: 持仓迁移系统：旧仓健康、新战线强度、机会成本、执行窗口、迁移动作。

modules.title: Risk Protection & Behavior Guardrail
modules.desc: 风险保护：高位止盈、恐慌成熟、禁止杠杆、Core/Swing分离、机会成本。

modules.title: Research Source & Evidence Quality
modules.desc: 证据系统：YouTube/X/财报/官方数据/研报/书籍的质量评分、偏见识别、周期有效性。

modules.title: Macro Regime & Liquidity State Machine
modules.desc: 宏观状态机：Goldilocks、流动性扩张/收缩、估值压缩、Risk-off、恐慌成熟等。

next_build_sequence: Unify all visual modules into one navigable single-page app shell
Create reusable component library: card, score, ladder, timeline, evidence panel, decision panel
Build sample data fixtures for CRDO/LITE/IREN/HOOD/NVDA
Implement scoring formulas for regime, narrative, risk, valuation, resonance
Create daily AI report template using the schema and agent routing
Begin real evidence collection for macro regime and CRDO sample page
current_truth: Conceptual architecture and static prototypes are substantially built. Next bottleneck is turning static prototypes into data-driven components and evidence-backed reports.
